failure_modes.text: Teams can gather many observations and still fail to act because no governing thought links the evidence into a decision-driving structure.
failure_modes.source_quote: Most useful when the facts exist but no governing thought exists.
failure_modes.mitigation: Force a governing thesis: after gathering observations, require one sentence that links the evidence into a decision-driving structure before moving forward.

failure_modes.text: Evidence can remain inert when analysis keeps expanding but no priority rule says what matters most.
failure_modes.source_quote: Works when analysis is finished but prioritization is not.
failure_modes.mitigation: Apply a priority filter: rank evidence by decision impact and discard or defer inputs that would not change the recommendation even if they were wrong.

failure_modes.text: A synthesis can fail by collapsing into a simple story that no longer carries the key reinforcing logic underneath it.
failure_modes.source_quote: Best when the audience needs linked insight, not evidence dump.
failure_modes.mitigation: Protect the reinforcing logic: when compressing a synthesis into a summary, verify that the key causal links and supporting mechanisms survive the simplification.

premortem_questions.text: What is the governing thought that should organize these facts, and what evidence genuinely belongs under it?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Most useful when the facts exist but no governing thought exists.

premortem_questions.text: Which conclusion actually deserves to drive action rather than just look interesting on the page?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Works when analysis is finished but prioritization is not.

premortem_questions.text: If this summary were shortened further, what causal spine would we lose that still matters for the decision?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Best when the audience needs linked insight, not evidence dump.

heuristics.text: Turn a mass of analysis into a small number of mutually reinforcing conclusions.
heuristics.source_quote: Best when the audience needs linked insight, not evidence dump.

heuristics.text: Use synthesis only after enough analysis exists to justify a real governing thought.
heuristics.source_quote: Works when analysis is finished but prioritization is not.

heuristics.text: Prune facts that do not strengthen the core decision-driving structure.
heuristics.source_quote: Synthesis demands focus and simplification, ignoring data that doesn't contribute to the core message.

curation_notes.summary: Focused on governing-thought formation, prioritization, and linked insight.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor summary-writing sprawl because the raw source already supports action-driving synthesis chunks.
open_questions: The source touches AI transformation layers, but the Wave 2 surface stays on synthesis as a human decision move.

allies: The raw allies section is strongest on scaffolding and systems-thinking.
antagonists: The source is strongest against evidence dumps and unfocused fact accumulation.
structured_tensions: The main tension is between integrated insight and overgrown analysis that never resolves into a governing thought.
